title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Luminous Power Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Luminous Power Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Luminous Power Technologies in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Luminous Power Technologies:
Luminous Power Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies!
